name: Atomix Co.,Ltd.
summary: Atomix Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells paints in Japan. The company offers road paints; and building paints, such as floors, roofs, waterproofing, household paints, and concrete structures. It also develops and sells software related to the maintenance and management of traffic safety and living environment infrastructure; purchases and sells paint-related products and home care products; manufactures construction machines for road paints; and provides logistics services. In addition, the company engages in the contracting construction business. Atomix Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
